title: Northland Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Northland, NZ, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to make your family trip unforgettable and budget-friendly
intro: Planning a family holiday in Northland, NZ? Look no further! With its stunning natural beauty, rich history, and exciting activities, Northland is the perfect destination for families. From Cape Reinga to Ninety Mile Beach, and from ancient kauri forests to Hokianga Harbour dunes, there's something for everyone. And the best part? You can enjoy it all without breaking the bank.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Right now, you can find some amazing deals on activities, accommodation, and travel insurance in Northland. Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in the Bay of Islands and Auckland, which is perfect for families looking to explore the region. Additionally, Discover Cars has family campervans from $89/day, making it easy to get around and see all the sights.

Booking.com is also offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings, giving you peace of mind when planning your trip. And with Cover-More travel insurance from $4.50/day, you can ensure you're protected in case anything goes wrong.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities for Families
sections.body:
Northland is full of exciting activities that are perfect for families. The Cape Reinga Lighthouse, Ninety Mile Beach sandboarding, and the Kauri Museum are all must-visits. And with Bookme.co.nz, you can get discounts on these activities, making them even more affordable.

The Waitangi Treaty Grounds and Hokianga Harbour dunes are also great places to visit, and with a little planning, you can make the most of your time and budget. Don't forget to take a walk on the Cape Reinga walkway, which is free and offers stunning views of the surrounding area.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
When planning a family holiday in Northland, there are a few things you can do to save money. Firstly, consider visiting outside of peak season, when prices are lower and the crowds are smaller. Secondly, look for accommodation that offers free cancellation, so you can change your plans if needed.

Thirdly, take advantage of free activities like walking on Ninety Mile Beach or exploring the Mangawhai Heads beach and estuary. Fourthly, pack your own food and snacks, rather than relying on restaurants and cafes. And finally, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices.
list: Look for accommodation with free cancellation
Pack your own food and snacks
Book in advance for the best prices
Consider a campervan for accommodation and transport

sections.heading: When to Book for the Best Prices
sections.body:
When it comes to booking your family holiday in Northland, timing is everything. The earlier you book, the better the prices will be. Consider booking your accommodation and activities at least 2-3 months in advance to get the best deals.

Additionally, keep an eye on websites like Bookme.co.nz and Discover Cars for last-minute deals and discounts. And don't forget to sign up for newsletters and follow social media accounts to stay up-to-date with the latest offers and promotions.
